reviews.comment:
Estupidos si van a cargar en los cambio de turno obviamente que va a ser lento el servicio y Pongan los vehiculos del lado del tanque al surtidor. Soy cliente y es la mejor ypf de ZN. Compadezco al personal. Que lidia con gente que se cree mas por basuriar a un laburante. He visto a un tipo de 40 años hacer una queja porque no inflaron una cubierta en hora pico cuando el aire esta disponible para el publico.

(Translated by Google)
They're idiots. If they're going to fill up during shift changes, obviously the service is going to be slow. And park the vehicles with the tank facing the pump. I'm a customer, and this is the best YPF in Zona Nacional. I feel sorry for the staff who have to deal with people who think they're better than everyone else by belittling a worker. I saw a 40-year-old man complain because they didn't inflate a tire during rush hour when air is available for the public.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNndlltZDdRRRAB
